title: Silky Sour French Fennel Sausage Salad
description: A lazySunday French salad that pairs succulent Italian fennel sausages with a silky yogurtlemon dressing, brightened by capers, dill, and a splash of white wine.

ingredients.name: Italian fennel sausage
ingredients.notes: sliced into ½" rounds after cooking

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add the fennel sausages, browning each side for 8‑10 minutes until a food‑temperature probe reads 160 °F (71 °C).
Transfer sausages to a plate and leave warm.
Deglaze the skillet with ¼ cup dry white wine, scraping up browned bits; simmer until reduced about 2 minutes.
Add 2 tbsp white wine vinegar, 1 tbsp fresh lemon juice, and 1 tbsp capers; stir and let simmer 2 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat and allow the sauce to cool slightly.
Slice the cooked sausages into ½" rounds and place them in a large bowl with thinly sliced ½ small red onion, 2 tbsp chopped dill, and 1 tbsp chopped parsley.
Pour the cooled sauce over the sausage mixture and toss gently to coat.
Fold in 1 cup plain Greek yogurt, seasoning with salt and black pepper to taste; if the dressing is too thick, add a splash of water or white wine to reach a silky consistency.
Let the salad rest 5 minutes before serving, optionally over a bed of mixed greens.
